summary: Marketing surfaces for sales-led B2B platforms targeting buyers, ops, and IT. Audience is evaluating credibility, vendor risk, and ROI — proof and case studies dominate the composition.

patterns.name: Outcome headline with sales CTA
patterns.summary: Single-column or split-media hero centered on an outcome claim (cost reduction, risk reduction). Primary CTA is 'Talk to sales' or 'Book a demo'; a secondary ghost CTA links to a self-serve overview.

variants.summary: Centered headline with a single dashboard image beneath.

anti_examples: Self-serve 'Sign up free' heroes belong in usage-based-saas, not here.

patterns.name: Logo grid
patterns.summary: A 3–4 row × 4–6 column grid of customer logos, monochrome, anchored under the hero. Used to communicate scale and category leaders.

variants.summary: Subtle row offset for visual rhythm.

patterns.name: Four-pillar platform overview
patterns.summary: Four feature cards in one row presenting the platform's modules. Each card has a small icon, a noun-phrase title (e.g. 'Governance'), and a 1–2 sentence description.

variants.summary: Each card includes a 'Learn more' affordance.

patterns.name: Three customer quote cards
patterns.summary: Three quote cards in a single row. Each card has a quote (≤220 chars), an attribution (name, role, company), and an optional small portrait or company glyph.

variants.summary: Replaces the portrait with a small company glyph.

anti_examples: Single full-width testimonial sections belong in proof-quotes/featured-quote, not this pattern.

patterns.name: ROI metric strip
patterns.summary: A row of 3 oversized numbers tied to customer outcomes (e.g. 'X% reduction in audit time'). Each metric has explicit units and a customer attribution beneath it.

variants.summary: Each metric notes the source customer (or 'fortune 500 retailer').

patterns.name: Tabbed category explainer
patterns.summary: A tab bar across 3–5 platform categories. Each tab swaps a copy + media pair beneath, allowing buyers to self-select.

variants.summary: Vertical tab list to the left, content to the right.

patterns.name: Contact-tier pricing
patterns.summary: A 3–4 column tier table where the rightmost tier is 'Enterprise' with a 'Contact us' CTA and no listed price. Lower tiers may show monthly figures.

variants.summary: Below the columns, a full feature comparison table is rendered.

anti_examples: Pure usage-meter pricing belongs in usage-based-saas.

patterns.name: Sales-led conversion band
patterns.summary: Full-width band with a heading framed as a question ('Ready to roll this out?'), a 'Talk to sales' primary CTA, and a 'See pricing' secondary link.

variants.summary: Centered with two CTAs side by side.
Heading on the left, CTAs on the right edge.
